name: mbti-personality-customiser
description: MBTI agent personality switch: list types, switch, rigour, multi-lens plan

steps.text: Skill mbti-personality-customiser. Catalogue mbti_types.py. Runtime /mbti and --mbti. Style lens only — not clinical diagnosis. Rigour overlay default on. SOUL boundaries outrank persona.

steps.prompt: Using skill mbti-personality-customiser and knowledge/personality/mbti-types.md, produce mbti-plan: (1) verdict — communication/style customiser not a personality test result (2) list or recommend type codes for the user's task if stated (3) exact switch commands: /mbti switch CODE, /mbti off, /mbti rigour on|off, --mbti CODE (4) if multiple types requested use multi-lens section structure (5) note that SOUL + domain skills + accuracy outrank flavour (6) OPEN model consistency. Do not diagnose the user as a type.
